texto: #4. Spend more time considering areas of agreement than disagreement. The doctrines you share with other true believers are the foundational doctrines
autor: the ones you do not share are necessarily less central to the faith. Acknowledging that you and those with whom you disagree will spend eternity together should encourage you to not allow peripheral doctrines to separate you here on earth.
